name: Mammoth
description:
### Special Abilities
[{name: Trampling Charge, desc: If the mammoth moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the mammoth can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.}]

### Actions
[{name: Gore, desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) piercing damage., attack_bonus: 10, damage: [{damage_type: piercing, damage_dice: 4d8+7}]}, {name: Stomp, desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage., attack_bonus: 10, damage: [{damage_type: bludgeoning, damage_dice: 4d10+7}]}]
